sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (d DateTime, v String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY d;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d), 4)(EXTRACT(SECOND FROM d), 1) FROM test_dates GROUP BY d;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt('-')(toString(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM d)), EXTRACT(DAY FROM d)) FROM test_dates;
SELECT d, groupArrayInsertAt(v, 1)(toString(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM d)), 2) FROM test_dates WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d) > 2021 GROUP BY d;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(COALESCE(toString(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM d)), 'N/A'), 3)(v, 1) FROM test_dates WHERE v IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_test (id UInt32, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt('-')(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at), 1) FROM temp_test GROUP BY id HAVING id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_test WHERE created_at < now());
SELECT groupArrayInsertAt(0, 5)(toUInt32(EXTRACT(DAY FROM created_at)), 0) FROM temp_test WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at;
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM d), groupArrayInsertAt(v, 0)(toString(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM d)), 0) FROM test_dates GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM d) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
